_doc: Tunable parameters for brain/temporal_sense.py and brain/temporal_metabolism.py. See docs/TEMPORAL_SENSE.md for the framework. Defaults chosen for verification-friendliness; tune after live observation.

fast_check._doc: Fast-check ticks ride the existing heartbeat cadence (7-280s mode-dependent in brain/heartbeat.py). No separate timer.
fast_check._max_tick_budget_doc: Hard performance budget for the fast-check section. If profiling shows we exceed, defer pieces to slow-cycle.

slow_cycle._doc: Slow-cycle metabolism cadence. Runs the full TRIAGE/CONTEXTUALIZE/DECAY/CONSOLIDATE/AUDIT pass. Yields to the voice loop on _conversation_active OR _turn_in_progress.
slow_cycle._interval_doc: 10 minutes default. Tunable 5-15 min per the design. Hour-or-faster cadence is the metabolism-vs-weekly distinction.
slow_cycle._micro_consolidation_queue_doc: If triage queue at slow-cycle tick has >= this many items, trigger micro-consolidation (subset of weekly consolidation).
slow_cycle._micro_consolidation_hours_doc: OR if it's been at least N hours since the last full weekly consolidation.

frustration._doc: Frustration decay rules. Two modes: passive (idle, linear-ish) and active (calming activity, exponential).
frustration._passive_decay_doc: Continuous decay of frustration weight per second when state==idle. 0.0004/s = 12% loss per 5 min from a baseline of 0.20 (0.20 * (1 - 0.0004*300) = 0.176). Tune up if frustration accumulates and never resolves; tune down if it always reads near zero.
frustration._active_tau_doc: Exponential half-life parameter for calming-activity decay. tau=120 -> half-life ~83s -> 0.20 falls below 0.05 in ~6 min.

boredom._doc: Boredom growth rules. Active only when is_idle() AND processing_active==False.
boredom._reengage_doc: On first user interaction after a long idle, boredom *= this factor (one-shot).

idle_detection._doc: State-aware idle detection. is_idle() requires processing_active==False AND elapsed > threshold AND voice loop in passive/attentive.

estimate_tracking._overrun_pct_doc: Fire interrupt when elapsed > (1 + this) * original_estimate. 0.25 = 25% over.
estimate_tracking._overrun_min_doc: AND elapsed - original_estimate must exceed this in absolute seconds. Filters out small-task noise (10s task at 12.5s shouldn't interrupt).
estimate_tracking._history_lookup_doc: Number of recent rows in task_history_log.jsonl to consider when calibrating a new estimate of the same kind.

uncertainty_hook._doc: Confidence-based interrupt hook. STRUCTURE shipped in B3 but DISABLED by default — see TEMPORAL_SENSE.md §6 'Open question for ROADMAP item 9'. Don't enable until the confidence-source question is answered.
uncertainty_hook._low_conf_doc: If enabled and a task's confidence drops below threshold AND elapsed > fraction*original_estimate, fire the uncertainty interrupt.

metabolism._triage_level_drop_doc: Concept graph nodes whose level dropped by >= this since last cycle get triaged.
metabolism._triage_recent_doc: Nodes activated in the last N seconds also get triaged for contextualization.
